scripts.build:wasm: bash -lc 'scripts/ensure-emsdk.sh && source ./emsdk/emsdk_env.sh && cmake -S . -B build -DCMAKE_TOOLCHAIN_FILE=$EMSDK/upstream/emscripten/cmake/Modules/Platform/Emscripten.cmake && cmake --build build --target cp_sat_runtime_site -j'
scripts.build:dist: bash -lc "rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist/wasm dist/site && cp build/bin/cp_sat_runtime.* dist/wasm/ && cp build/bin/cp_sat_api.* dist/wasm/ && cp build/bin/cpsat_worker.* dist/wasm/ && cp build/bin/cpsat_worker_types.* dist/wasm/ && cp build/bin/globals.d.ts dist/wasm/ && cp -R build/site/. dist/site/"
scripts.build: npm run build:wasm && npm run build:site && npm run ts:check && npm run ts:site && npm run ts:worker-types && npm run build:dist
